arts.sum: Wayne Rooney was sacked as Plymouth Argyle manager last month and is now reportedly in discussions with the BBC about joining their team

arts.sum: Samuel Luckhurst has made an interesting claim over Alejandro Garnacho's situation at Manchester United.

arts.sum: The blockbuster Battle of Britain could be the perfect platform for one Ibrox star

arts.ttl: Man Utd decide to SELL Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Man Utd have decided to sell Alejandro Garnacho to Napoli this month if their asking price is met. However, CaughtOffside are now reporting that United have made the decision to sell Garnacho in January if Napoli offer a fair price for the player.

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Brighton confirmed
arts.sum: Man United's players started to arrive at Old Trafford from 10am ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Brighton.

arts.ttl: Man United's £86m flop Antony is finally set to get his move away to end Old Trafford nightmare... with the Brazilian winger on the verge of joining 11th-place LaLiga side on loan after breakthrough in talks
arts.sum: A LaLiga side are closing in on an agreement with Manchester United over a subsidised loan with no buy option until June 2025 for Antony, Mail Sport can reveal.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy pays tribute to Manchester United great Denis Law with emotional story
arts.sum: Denis Law passed away, aged 84, as the Man United and Scotland great is fondly remembered by Leicester City manager and former Old Trafford favourite Ruud van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: Napoli director offers update on interest in Man Utd's Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Napoli's sporting director discusses interest in signing Man Utd winger Alejandro Garnacho.
